headline: Fox Corporation (FOXA) Target Cut at Wells Fargo, Cites Longer-Term Growth Uncertainty
summary: We recently compiled a list of the 10 Large-Cap Stocks with Insider Buying in 2026. Fox Corporation is one of the best stocks with Insider Buying. TheFly reported on March 27 that Wells Fargo reduced its price target for FOXA to $67 from $75 while maintaining an Equal Weight rating. The firm sees potential upside […]
